imuGAP 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Custom imuGAP fit extraction

Source: R/imuGAP.R
extract_imugap.Rd

Thin wrapper around rstan::extract to extract typical imuGAP parameters.

Usage

extract_imugap(fit, pars = c("beta_bs"), ...)

Arguments

fit

an imugap_fit object returned by sampling()

pars

character vector; parameters to extract. Defaults to "beta_bs", the state-level B-spline parameter.

...

additional arguments passed to [rstan::extract()].

Value

a list, as returned by rstan::extract()

Examples

data("fit_sim")
extract_imugap(fit_sim)
#> $beta_bs
#>           
#> iterations      [,1]      [,2]      [,3]      [,4]      [,5]
#>       [1,] -1.855626 -1.574046 -2.444038 -2.885832 -2.846942
#>       [2,] -1.665408 -1.680810 -2.299305 -3.035881 -2.577263
#>       [3,] -1.649290 -1.766381 -2.395551 -2.979214 -2.879707
#>       [4,] -1.949497 -1.493845 -2.435368 -2.895121 -2.670173
#>       [5,] -1.711890 -1.604636 -2.585716 -2.686843 -2.885818
#>       [6,] -1.529853 -1.787906 -2.338063 -3.096717 -2.719221
#>       [7,] -1.704533 -1.663132 -2.247052 -3.036028 -2.631341
#>       [8,] -1.730278 -1.657516 -2.449100 -3.016242 -2.761815
#>       [9,] -1.736071 -1.708860 -2.340788 -3.121707 -2.536165
#>      [10,] -1.587863 -1.783525 -2.200278 -3.305147 -2.498514
#>      [11,] -1.787135 -1.637202 -2.314141 -2.958515 -2.676211
#>      [12,] -1.629725 -1.667403 -2.310295 -2.970697 -2.510903
#>      [13,] -1.803002 -1.641359 -2.426132 -2.880639 -2.659128
#>      [14,] -1.574504 -1.808086 -2.262858 -3.123177 -2.561585
#>      [15,] -1.784303 -1.670256 -2.423816 -3.102502 -2.932191
#>      [16,] -1.753051 -1.586544 -2.346170 -2.899524 -2.625882
#>      [17,] -1.825331 -1.562556 -2.441720 -2.875846 -2.588847
#>      [18,] -1.771116 -1.645167 -2.255521 -2.918584 -2.712483
#>      [19,] -1.687104 -1.825704 -2.244586 -3.218372 -2.474911
#>      [20,] -1.653274 -1.716264 -2.259528 -3.038668 -2.719690
#>      [21,] -1.873714 -1.639843 -2.365871 -2.917839 -2.824109
#>      [22,] -1.661080 -1.600362 -2.533216 -2.814625 -2.789395
#>      [23,] -1.719837 -1.669080 -2.520170 -2.911443 -2.729254
#>      [24,] -1.843521 -1.671642 -2.392223 -3.015082 -3.044453
#>      [25,] -1.666411 -1.760000 -2.213502 -3.069599 -2.670269
#>      [26,] -1.732683 -1.677309 -2.447396 -2.962506 -2.873564
#>      [27,] -1.750886 -1.600018 -2.405879 -2.946440 -2.494334
#>      [28,] -1.702850 -1.727149 -2.318237 -3.025454 -2.503693
#>      [29,] -1.617904 -1.865809 -2.117528 -3.290699 -2.597300
#>      [30,] -1.684174 -1.673353 -2.339139 -3.059235 -2.730875
#>      [31,] -1.602341 -1.669960 -2.241130 -3.060716 -2.533224
#>      [32,] -1.816359 -1.560273 -2.532620 -3.007896 -2.772503
#>      [33,] -1.704057 -1.654547 -2.243194 -2.969992 -2.527396
#>      [34,] -1.721369 -1.678429 -2.402526 -2.973129 -2.777792
#>      [35,] -1.597206 -1.685087 -2.349364 -2.959589 -2.683340
#>      [36,] -1.807934 -1.740287 -2.276849 -3.135787 -2.746709
#>      [37,] -1.908879 -1.571809 -2.554101 -2.985361 -3.075204
#>      [38,] -1.752994 -1.701733 -2.430112 -2.986000 -2.873814
#>      [39,] -1.815958 -1.702478 -2.262323 -3.242865 -2.796428
#>      [40,] -1.861301 -1.594881 -2.439387 -2.844855 -2.763038
#>      [41,] -1.659635 -1.818775 -2.143274 -3.133790 -2.639858
#>      [42,] -1.748563 -1.646994 -2.447321 -3.008785 -2.701514
#>      [43,] -1.583387 -1.787238 -2.216745 -3.003965 -2.692655
#>      [44,] -1.735292 -1.535718 -2.546508 -2.758694 -2.935575
#>      [45,] -1.767724 -1.632718 -2.393852 -3.129732 -2.607049
#>      [46,] -1.713743 -1.603757 -2.469346 -3.007203 -2.649805
#>      [47,] -1.841275 -1.521566 -2.720620 -2.776767 -3.021579
#>      [48,] -1.718210 -1.726029 -2.472197 -2.997974 -2.904911
#>      [49,] -1.742832 -1.590639 -2.390606 -2.982848 -2.618028
#>      [50,] -1.779885 -1.625133 -2.385669 -3.079019 -2.455931
#> 
extract_imugap(fit_sim, pars = "lambda_raw")
#> $lambda_raw
#>           
#> iterations      [,1]     [,2]
#>       [1,] 0.9905015 1.063347
#>       [2,] 1.0538284 1.076289
#>       [3,] 0.9853724 1.041603
#>       [4,] 1.0359140 1.073980
#>       [5,] 0.9965769 1.057164
#>       [6,] 1.0052688 1.060051
#>       [7,] 1.0316239 1.078029
#>       [8,] 1.0188818 1.039426
#>       [9,] 1.0315115 1.064331
#>      [10,] 1.0034162 1.063740
#>      [11,] 1.0449051 1.065301
#>      [12,] 1.0342232 1.085256
#>      [13,] 1.0366091 1.082699
#>      [14,] 1.0111366 1.058102
#>      [15,] 0.9489110 1.017027
#>      [16,] 1.0584860 1.084412
#>      [17,] 1.0559888 1.095026
#>      [18,] 1.0440167 1.086761
#>      [19,] 1.0063992 1.028470
#>      [20,] 1.0252470 1.075542

#>      [26,] 1.0317977 1.043526

#>      [29,] 0.9950785 1.040848
#>      [30,] 0.9910711 1.049180
#>      [31,] 1.0120670 1.069301
#>      [32,] 1.0105587 1.060918
#>      [33,] 1.0549285 1.115771
#>      [34,] 1.0587738 1.052150
#>      [35,] 1.0258162 1.073456
#>      [36,] 0.9921289 1.031364
#>      [37,] 0.9435297 1.039292
#>      [38,] 0.9684548 1.034262

#>      [50,] 1.0078987 1.071775
#>
